creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As staylor@cancercare.net wrote:

> When TFTP-ing a file to the FreeBSD server, if a file already exists,
> it is not truncated.

Already fixed by rev 1.5 of tftpd.c (it's in -current and 2.2).

cheers, J"org
